description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt-get and installs build-essential, gcc, cmake, libgit2-dev and libssh2-1-dev. Define a single job named test:cargo in the default test stage that executes "rustc --version && cargo --version" and then runs "cargo test --all --verbose". No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
